summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.intent; public class Ambiguity { private final String part; private final String reason; public Ambiguity(String part, String reason) { this.part = part; this.reason = reason; } public String getPart() { return part; } public String getReason() { return reason; } @Override public String toString() { return "Part: '" + part + "', Reason: " + reason; } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
